title: How a Mid-Sized Contractor Reduced Reporting Time by 85% and Improved Project Visibility
clientProfile: General Contractor | $8M Annual Revenue | 6 Active Projects
challenge: The client’s PM team was spending 5-7 hours weekly per project compiling reports, with limited real-time visibility into cost overruns and delays.
solution: Implemented an AI-powered reporting and project controls system that automated weekly reporting, standardized templates, and flagged risks early.
results: Reporting time reduced from 6 hours to 45 minutes per project.
Improved visibility across all active projects.
Earlier identification of budget and schedule risks.
PMs redirected time to actual project execution.
feedback: We didn’t realize how much time we were losing on reporting until this was implemented. The difference is immediate and practical.

title: Recovering Lost Revenue from Missed Calls & Slow Follow-Up
challenge: Missed inbound calls and delayed responses were leading to lost jobs and inconsistent customer experience.
solution: Implemented an AI-assisted communication and follow-up system, including automated responses and structured lead tracking.
results: Reduced missed calls and response delays.
feedback: We didn’t change our team, we just changed how we operate. The system now does what we used to forget.

title: Streamlining Tenant Communication & Maintenance Tracking
challenge: Overwhelming tenant communication and poor tracking of maintenance requests.
solution: Introduced structured workflows and AI-assisted communication templates for tenant requests and updates.
feedback: Everything is now structured. We are no longer reacting, we are managing.

title: From Reactive Operations to Structured Workflow
challenge: No defined systems for scheduling, communication, or tracking jobs.
solution: Set up simple operational systems (scheduling, communication templates, job tracking).
feedback: Before this, everything was in my head. Now the business runs more smoothly without me chasing everything.
